quality.rationale: 基于局部惯性系与等效原理的张量构造性证明，逻辑链条完整且高度抽象普适

origin.question:
[文件 1: 1_s8_8.11.md]

Problem 8.11. Show that there exists no tensor with components constructed from the 10 metric coefficients $\mathbf{g}_{\alpha  eta}$ and their 40 first derivatives $\mathbf{g}_{\alpha  eta, \mu}$ - except $\mathbf{g}$ itself and products of it with itself, e.g. $\mathbf{g} \otimes \mathbf{g}$ .

## Solution
origin.answer: 不存在除 $g$ 本身及其自乘积外的其他独立张量；在任意点该张量必为平直度规 $\eta_{\\alpha\\beta}$ 的代数组合，故全局上只能由 $g$ 构成。
origin.solution: Solution 8.11. Suppose there were such a tensor. What would be its components at some arbitrary point in a freely falling local orthonormal frame? In this frame all the $\mathbf{g}_{\alpha \beta, \mu}$ vanish (because all the $\Gamma_{\alpha \beta \mu}$ vanish), and $\mathbf{g}_{\alpha \beta} = \eta_{\alpha \beta}$ . Thus the tensor must be some algebraic combination of $\eta_{\alpha \beta}$ , "zero," and possibly $\delta^{\alpha}{}_{\beta}$ and $\varepsilon^{a\beta\gamma\delta}$ . You can very quickly convince yourself that the only nontrivial one is $\eta \otimes \eta \otimes \dot s \otimes \eta$ (the $\delta$ only renames indices, e.g. $\delta^{\alpha}{}_{\beta}\eta_{\alpha\gamma} = \eta_{\beta\gamma}$ and the $\varepsilon^{a\beta\gamma\delta}$ gives zero by its antisymmetries, or else just gets some of its indices lowered). Since we chose an arbitrary point, the conclusion holds at all points.
